rejected_candidates.title: Arbitrary external calls are reentrancy-reachable while the contract holds funds and live approvals
rejected_candidates.reason: The code has no reentrancy guard, but the identified callees are hard-coded external contracts rather than attacker-controlled hooks, and no concrete callback path causing realistic additional harm is evidenced beyond the already reported blind-call and unauthorized-execution issues.

rejected_candidates.title: Counter exposes unrestricted state mutation
rejected_candidates.reason: `Counter.sol` is a standalone toy counter with no privileged role, funds flow, or protocol-critical invariants, so public setters do not create realistic audit-relevant harm in this codebase.
